name: diagnostic-lens
description: Enhances VS Code diagnostics with inline pill-shaped indicators showing errors, warnings, hints, and info.

diagnosticLens.enableInfo.description: Show inline indicators for informational messages.

diagnosticLens.pillTransparency.description: Background blending intensity for the pill (0 = fully blended with editor background, 1 = full diagnostic color).

diagnosticLens.pillOpacity.description: Visual opacity of the pill element (0 = invisible, 1 = fully visible).

diagnosticLens.dotSize.description: Size in pixels for diagnostic status dots.

diagnosticLens.dotOpacity.description: Visual opacity of diagnostic status dots (0 = invisible, 1 = fully visible).

diagnosticLens.arrowColor.description: Color used for the inline arrow SVG.

diagnosticLens.arrowOpacity.description: Visual opacity of the inline arrow SVG (0 = invisible, 1 = fully visible).

diagnosticLens.maxMessageLength.description: Maximum number of characters to display in the inline message.
